title: Coordinate and monitor milking operations
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Coordinate and monitor milking operations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine requirements for milking operations

pcs.text: Identify milk operations according to production requirements and clarify with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify milk operations according to production requirements and clarify with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify milk operations according to production requirements and clarify with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify requirements for determining and maintaining milk quality according to food safety plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify requirements for determining and maintaining milk quality according to food safety plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify requirements for determining and maintaining milk quality according to food safety plan.

pcs.text: Identify resources and equipment requirements, including personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify resources and equipment requirements, including personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify resources and equipment requirements, including personal protective equipment (PPE).

pcs.text: Identify milking shed and equipment cleaning and hygiene requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify milking shed and equipment cleaning and hygiene requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify milking shed and equipment cleaning and hygiene requirements.

pcs.text: Identify work health and safety and biosecurity hazards, assess risks and determine control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work health and safety and biosecurity hazards, assess risks and determine control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work health and safety and biosecurity hazards, assess risks and determine control measures.

elements.title: Prepare for milking operations

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust milking equipment as required in consultation with relevant personnel or report complex repairs for specialist attention.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out manufacturer specified vat cleaning routines and monitor water temperature circulating chemical concentrations throughout cleaning cycle.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine milking procedures with minimum stress to livestock and maximum yield according to workplace timeframes.
